commands.payload:
changelog 2.0.19+f76e648c96
Copyright (c) 2020-2022, Andreas Gruenwald

  generate, g    (Default Verb) Generate a change log from a git repository

  help           Display more information on a specific command.

  version        Display version information.

result.stdout:
changelog 2.0.19+f76e648c96
Copyright (c) 2020-2022, Andreas Gruenwald

  -r, --repository               The local path of the git repository to
                                 generate a change log for.

  -c, --configurationFilePath    The path of the configuration file to use. When
                                 no configuration file path is specified,
                                 changelog looks for a file named
                                 'changelog.settings.json' in the repository
                                 directory. If no configuration file is found,
                                 default settings are used.

  -o, --outputPath               The path to save the changelog to.

  --githubAccessToken            The access token to use if the GitHub
                                 integration is enabled.

  --gitlabAccessToken            The access token to use if the GitLab
                                 integration is enabled.

  -v, --verbose                  (Default: false) Increase the level of detail
                                 for messages logged to the console.

  --versionRange                 The range of versions to include in the change
                                 log. Value must be a valid NuGet version range.

  --currentVersion               Sets the version of the currently checked-out
                                 commit. Value must be a valid semantic version

  --template                     Sets the template to use for generating the
                                 changelog.

  --integrationProvider          Sets the integration provider to use

  --help                         Display this help screen.

  --version                      Display version information.

staticCommands.name: generate
staticCommands.description: Generate a change log from a git repository
